residual_risks.note: Story transitioned directly from backlog → review per the diff comment ('backlog → in-progress → review'). The workflow states the expected path is backlog → in-progress → review via /start-story then /review-story, but the sprint-status diff shows only a single final state change (backlog → review). The intermediate in-progress state was apparently not committed separately. This is a process observation only — the file now correctly shows 'review' and no standards rule mandates intermediate commits.
